expected_behavior: The STDIO MCP server starts through the SDK client, advertises no tools, and lists only the five allowlisted runtime resource URIs.
failure_mode: The transport layer is missing, exposes tools too early, or diverges from the allowlisted read model.

expected_behavior: The STDIO MCP server returns summary and latest review resources that parse through @krn/contracts and preserve read-only/write-disabled caveats.
failure_mode: The transport returns raw or unparsed runtime state, hides source/caveat fields, or implies write capability.

expected_behavior: The STDIO MCP server rejects unknown resource URIs instead of falling through to broad filesystem or runtime access.
failure_mode: The transport accepts arbitrary resource URIs or leaks state outside the allowlist.
